meaning: n.波,波浪,(挥手)示意,致意vi.(挥手)示意,致意,波动,飘动,摇动
examples: He dismissed her with an airy wave.
His boat hit a wave and somersaulted.
A wave of fear swept over him.
Executives at Microsoft acknowledge that a fourth wave has begun but insist Microsoft will dominate it.
They began to give way in the 1970s to the second wave: less costly midrange minicomputers.
